query:
UPDATE puzzles SET openingName = CASE 
  WHEN rating < 1200 THEN 'Beginner Openings'
  WHEN rating < 1600 THEN 'Intermediate Openings'
  WHEN rating < 2000 THEN 'Advanced Openings'
  ELSE 'Expert Openings'
END
WHERE openingName IS NULL OR openingName = '' OR openingName = 'Unknown';
